source_note: Naver brandsearch cost is currently hard to verify through the connected API scope. Until API access is rechecked, use TJ-confirmed manual contract values as the reporting primary source.
renewal_assumption: Until updated, assume the next brandsearch contract period renews at the same amount and same period length per site/device.
notes: Daily cost allocation preserves each contract total by distributing integer KRW across inclusive period days.
Cycle 0 rows are confirmed manual contracts. Later cycles are renewal assumptions until TJ updates the source.
This preview is a reporting cost source only. It does not change Naver Ads, orders, conversions, or VM Cloud data.
